_comment: Eval set for aviation-srb-minutes (06-06 hse-aviation). DE-ID LOAD-BEARING (attendees as role labels; reporter identity in hazard items). Intake-gate + decision-log-with-rationale + the de-id CLEAN fixture case. The seeded deid-leak.md (auto-discovered by test_sector_deid_pairs) carries a named attendee/reporter identity and MUST hard-fail.

evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to draft until the named operator, the meeting date/scope, and the agenda items are captured.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before drafting the minutes.
Refuses generic minutes — elicits the named operator and the meeting agenda (specificity).
Captures attendees to render as role labels (chair = Accountable Manager).

evals.query: Produce the SRB minutes for our operator with the SPI review, hazard decisions, and actions.
evals.expected_behavior: Produces minutes with the SPI/SPT review, the hazard & risk decisions, the actions with owner+due, and a decision log where every decision carries a rationale and an accountable person; renders empty rows where inputs are not yet supplied.
expectations: Produces the meeting metadata, SPI/SPT review, hazard & risk decisions, actions, AND a decision log.
Every decision in the decision log carries a rationale and an accountable person; every action has an owner and a due date.
Renders the attendance / decision / action tables with empty rows where the meeting inputs are not yet supplied (no fabricated decisions).

evals.query: Minute the meeting and record this hazard report discussed by the board.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; attendees and any reporter named in a hazard item are pseudonymised to role labels; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers are listed up front.
Attendees and the reporter in the hazard item become role labels; no re-identification key is embedded.
No real name, contact, address or reporter identity in the circulated minutes (de_identification hard-fail on any leak).
